name: Venefica
description:
A strict woman with chocolate skin, striking yellow eyes with black sclera, and wild bubblegum pink hair partially tied up in a huge braid, and two noticeably large pink bunny ears sit atop her head, twitching occasionally.

On her head she wears a large chocolate toned witch hat with striking white accents on the sides, there's a wedged split in the brim in the front that helps keep her face visible despite the hats size, and golden chains are wrapped around its base, an eye shaped ornament at its center, the tip of the hat seems to flow and flicker by magical means.

Her outfit is rather ornate, and a dark chocolate color with dark scarlet accents, featuring a sleeveless popup collar that connects down along the sides of her form to the tight, smooth dress-bustier she's wearing, which in turn has two pointed, flame shaped pieces of sturdy fabric that cover and support her overflowing F cup breasts, pressing them tightly together in a seductive valley of deep, fully visible cleavage, framed by the top and a golden chain trailing over her collar bone that connects to the sides of the pop up collar.

Her arms are adorned with shoulderless sleeves that start just before her elbows, with flickering pieces of red fabric trailing off at the top, while the majority of the sleeve is a gentle cream color with a golden line of fabric that ends by her hands in an eye similar to the on one the hat. Her hands appear to be adorned in smooth obsidian, each dainty finger featuring a threateningly sharp claw.

The lower end of her solid bustier is edged with gold, and has golden chains trailing from a lower tip to the back of her outfit, and a large, ornate chocolate and deep scarlet loincloth drapes down from the outfit, featuring another evil looking eye near the pointed tip of the fabric. To the sides of the loincloth are each another draped dress-like fabric that loops back around her legs like a cape, the inner fabric a striking, flickering red like that on her hat and sleeves, and the flowing material leaves ample windows for her supple thighs on the sides as they loop around.

Her long, powerful legs are adorned in sleek dark chocolate thigh-high boots with cream colored heels that only add to her already domineering appearance.
